case_title: TROPHY PROPERTIES VIII LLC VS. ELIZABETH MIRENDA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROPHY PROPERTIES VIII LLC COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-11-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MIRENDA, ELIZABETH HEARING SET FOR APR-20-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-11-2011. MATTER SETTLED WITH THE JUDGE PRO TEM. (206)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROPHY PROPERTIES VIII LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MIRENDA, ELIZABETH DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT MIRENDA, ELIZABETH
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT MIRENDA, ELIZABETH
RETURNED MAIL - ADDRESSEE NO LONGER AT ADDRESS: ORDER STRIKING FILING FOR FAILURE TO PAY COURT FEES MAILED TO ELIZABETH MIRENDA - ADDRESS MATCHES 1ST APPEARANCE (ANSWER) OF MAR-20-2011

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-20-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ELIZABETH MIRENDA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MIRENDA, ELIZABETH
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL
FEES NOT PAID. ANSWER OF ELIZABETH MIRENDA FILED ON 3/10/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
